creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)
That's very odd, as I can reproduce the problem quite easily.  I'm using the ports system that I downloaded earlier today via svnlite, Revision: 505070.  This uses 
net/py-libnet v 1.13.  When I revert to the earlier version 1.12_1, I don't have a problem.  Are we comparing apples to apples? :)
